name: George Marshall
longDesc: Chef d'état-major de l'US Army tout au long de la guerre, George Marshall devient ensuite secrétaire d'État et donne son nom au Plan Marshall de 1947. Carte WC4 maréchal infanterie : bonus logistique et moral exceptionnels, utile en back-line pour accélérer la production.

skills.name: Guerrilla Master
skills.desc: Evade 15% damage dealt by enemy land units. After attacking, restore 20% HP of the damage dealt to enemy units

skills.name: Infantry Group Charge
skills.desc: 40% chance that two of the inactive infantry units around will join the attack (Only once per turn)

skills.name: Organisation
skills.desc: Recover 3% maximum HP on the next turn when the infantry units are more than half damaged

skills.name: Raider
skills.desc: Deal +6% damage to the enemy when commanding infantry units

skills.name: Infantry Leader
skills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding infantry units

stages.label: Entraînement final
stages.notes: Slots max : 5. Coût additionnel : 0 médailles, 100 mérite.

training.summary: Entraînement premium débloquant des compétences signature et augmentant les plafonds d'attributs.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4

trainedSkills.name: Guerrilla Master
trainedSkills.desc: Evade 15% damage dealt by enemy land units. After attacking, restore 20% HP of the damage dealt to enemy units

trainedSkills.name: Infantry Group Charge
trainedSkills.desc: 40% chance that two of the inactive infantry units around will join the attack (Only once per turn)

trainedSkills.name: Organisation
trainedSkills.desc: Recover 3% maximum HP on the next turn when the infantry units are more than half damaged

trainedSkills.name: Raider
trainedSkills.desc: Deal +6% damage to the enemy when commanding infantry units

trainedSkills.name: Infantry Leader
trainedSkills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding infantry units

trainedSkills.name: Wartime Mobilization
trainedSkills.desc: When commanding infantry units, there is a 100% chance to deal a critical attack and recovers 15% of your maximum HP each turn. At the same time, the commander and all infantry units within a 2-hex radius deal 30% more damage and receive 25% less damage. (If the general has this skill, the effects of Infantry Leader are inapplicable.)
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

trainedSkills.name: Marshall Plan
trainedSkills.desc: When commanding land units, 40% of the economy spent during the turn will be regained in the next turn (up to 1200). When commanding land units, for each enemy eliminated within 3 hexes of the commanding units, you gain 40 Industry and 4 Technology (can be triggered up to 3 times per turn).
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

longDescEn: George Marshall served as US Army Chief of Staff throughout the war, later became Secretary of State and gave his name to the 1947 Marshall Plan. A WC4 marshal-rank infantry card with outstanding logistics and morale bonuses — useful in the back line to accelerate production.
longDescDe: George Marshall war während des gesamten Krieges Generalstabschef der US Army, später Außenminister und Namensgeber für den Marshallplan von 1947. Im WC4 eine Marschall-Infanteriekarte mit herausragenden Logistik- und Moralboni — stark in der Hinterlinie, um die Produktion zu beschleunigen.
